description: Actor creation, duplication, selection, and level management

functions.name: SpawnActorFromObject
functions.description: Create an actor and place it in the world editor. The Actor can be created from a Factory, Archetype, Blueprint, Class or an Asset.

functions.name: SpawnActorFromClass
functions.description: Create an actor and place it in the world editor. Can be created from a Blueprint or a Class.

functions.name: SetSelectedLevelActors
functions.description: Clear the current world editor selection and select the provided actors. Exclude actor that are pending kill, in PIE, PreviewEditor, ...

functions.name: SetComponentTransform
functions.description: Sets the world transform of the given component, if possible.

functions.name: SetActorTransform
functions.description: Sets the world transform of the given actor, if possible.

functions.name: SetActorSelectionState
functions.description: Set the selection state for the selected actor

functions.name: SelectNothing
functions.description: Selects nothing in the editor (another way to clear the selection)

functions.name: SelectAllChildren
functions.description: Select all children actors of the current selection.

functions.name: SelectAll
functions.description: Select all actors and BSP models in the given world, except those which are hidden

functions.name: InvertSelection
functions.description: Invert the selection in the given world

functions.name: GetSelectedLevelActors
functions.description: Find all loaded Actors that are selected in the world editor. Exclude actor that are pending kill, in PIE, PreviewEditor, ...

functions.name: GetAllLevelActorsComponents
functions.description: Find all loaded ActorComponent own by an actor in the world editor. Exclude actor that are pending kill, in PIE, PreviewEditor, ...

functions.name: GetAllLevelActors
functions.description: Find all loaded Actors in the world editor. Exclude actor that are pending kill, in PIE, PreviewEditor, ...

functions.name: GetActorReference
functions.description: Attempts to find the actor specified by PathToActor in the current editor world

functions.name: DuplicateSelectedActors
functions.description: Duplicate all the selected actors in the given world

functions.name: DuplicateActors
functions.description: Duplicate actors from the world editor.

functions.name: DuplicateActor
functions.description: Duplicate an actor from the world editor.

functions.name: DestroyActors
functions.description: Destroy the actors from the world editor. Notify the Editor that the actor got destroyed.

functions.name: DestroyActor
functions.description: Destroy the actor from the world editor. Notify the Editor that the actor got destroyed.

functions.name: DeleteSelectedActors
functions.description: Delete all the selected actors in the given world

functions.name: ConvertActors
functions.description: Replace in the level all Actors provided with a new actor of type ActorClass. Destroy all Actors provided.

functions.name: ClearActorSelectionSet
functions.description: Remove all actors from the selection set
